text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
It's not really something I wanna blab to everyone
about... Hm, then again, you should probably
know what's up.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Thing is, I just can't shed this weight. Like, I've
gotta do something about it, but I dunno what.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
You wouldn't happen to know any tips and tricks
on how to get back to peak racing weight, would
you?
choice_data_list:
How about you turn what you like into
exercise?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
What I like, huh? Sounds good and all, but what
should I pick?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I know! I can't believe I didn't think of it right
away!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She leads me off, and before we know it, we're at
the golf course.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Ahh... Nothing quite clears up the head like some
good ol' golfing! This is really good exercise too!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Plus, the math's a cinch! Each ball I hit burns one
kilocalorie! Count 'em all up, and I can calculate a
good calorie deficit!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
All I gotta do is keep sending golf balls flying! I'm
gonna aim for quadruple digits!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
You should send all your worries away with a few
good swings, too! I'll even coach you up!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I accept her invitation, and the two of us hit
untold numbers of golf balls. Mejiro Palmer
successfully gets back to her ideal race weight
too.
